days.text: Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers by the end of the day. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. Possible thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Light winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 3 southeasterly winds.
